ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eric Cha appeared by zoom for Jean Sheik (petitioner).

Mr. Cha stated that he has not gotten any objections. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 22, 2004 and the undated codicil are admitted to probate. Jean Sheik is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond in the amount of $2,000,000.00 is required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
